title: Graph Goblin
short_description: Read the goblin's hoard charts — socks, spoons, doorknobs — or he smugly rings his tiny Bell of Shame.
description: Grubbins the goblin hoards THINGS — stolen socks, shiny spoons, doorknobs — and he keeps meticulous charts of all of it. Answer questions about his hoard by reading pictograms, bar charts and line graphs: which day had the most, how many more on Tuesday than Thursday, how many all week. Get it wrong and he smugly rings his tiny Bell of Shame. Grade bands ramp from counting pictogram rows, to reading bar charts, to big scales, differences and line graphs. A free online data-handling and graph-reading game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the answer that matches the chart.
